overview.Name: Alpha Cognition Inc
overview.Description: Alpha Cognition Inc. is a pioneering biopharmaceutical company dedicated to developing innovative therapies for neurodegenerative diseases, with a strong emphasis on Alzheimer's disease. Its lead candidate, ACOG-100, is designed to enhance cognitive function in patients and address significant unmet medical needs within the aging population. Driven by a robust R&D strategy and a proprietary neuroscience platform, Alpha Cognition is strategically positioned to revolutionize patient care in this critical area. As the company continues to advance its clinical pipeline and explore new therapeutic avenues, it represents a compelling opportunity for institutional investors navigating the evolving healthcare landscape.
overview.Address: 750 WEST PENDER STREET, VANCOUVER, BC, CANADA, V6C 2T8
